title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
snippet: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inh...
